trust_badges.badge_1: Hot Spring Dealer of the Year

hero.headline:
38 Years of Relaxation Delivered
to Your Door
hero.subheadline: From hot tubs and pools to billiards and saunas, Elko Spas has helped Grand Strand families create their perfect backyard escape since 1987. Visit our Myrtle Beach showroom and experience the no-pressure difference.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Everything for Your Backyard<br class="hidden md:block"> Oasis Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From hot tubs and swimming pools to game rooms and saunas, Elko is your one-stop destination for relaxation, recreation, and wellness in the Grand Strand.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Premium Hot Spring and Artesian spas, including salt water models. Full water care support, testing, and maintenance from certified technicians.

cards.title: Swimming Pools
cards.description: Inground and above-ground pools from ALAGLAS, Imagine Pools, and more. Complete design, installation, and ongoing maintenance services.

cards.title: Swim Spas & Cold Plunge
cards.description: PDC Swim Spas for year-round fitness and Vigor Cold Plunge systems for recovery. The best of wellness technology in one place.

cards.title: Billiards & Game Rooms
cards.description: Olhausen billiard tables, shuffleboards, foosball, and game room furniture. Professional delivery, leveling, and setup included.

cards.title: Saunas & Wellness
cards.description: Tylo brand luxury home saunas for health and relaxation. Expert installation and guidance to create your personal wellness retreat.

cards.title: Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Full-service department for spas, pools, and billiard tables. Water testing, chemical supplies, repairs, and expert technical support.

how_it_works.headline: Your Perfect Backyard in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Browse Our Showroom
steps.description: Visit our Myrtle Beach showroom on Highway 17 Bypass. Our knowledgeable team will walk you through every option with zero pressure — just honest answers to your questions.

steps.title: We Design & Deliver
steps.description: From selection to installation, our trained technicians handle everything. We deliver, set up, and make sure every detail is perfect before we leave your property.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy
steps.description: Your backyard oasis is ready. And with our full-service department behind you, ongoing maintenance, water care, and support are just a phone call away.

about.label: Why Grand Strand Families Choose Elko
about.headline: Not Just a Dealer — Your Backyard Partner Since 1987
about.description: For nearly four decades, Elko Spas, Billiards & Pools has been the Grand Strand's most trusted name in backyard living. Multiple-time National Hot Spring Dealer of the Year winner and AQUA 100 Top Dealer, we carry the highest quality brands at fair prices. Our team educates you on every product we sell so you make the right choice — never a pressured one.

features.title: Award-Winning Expertise
features.description: Multiple National Dealer of the Year awards and AQUA 100 recognition prove our commitment to excellence in every sale and service.

features.title: No-Pressure Shopping
features.description: We believe in educating, not selling. Visit our showroom and take your time — our team is here to answer questions, not push products.

features.title: Full-Service, In-House
features.description: Sales, delivery, installation, and maintenance all handled by our own trained team. No subcontractors, no runaround, just reliable service.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing on Premium Products.
pricing.subtitle: Visit our showroom for personalized quotes on hot tubs, pools, game tables, and more. Financing options available.

guarantee.headline: Our "Relax With Confidence" Promise
guarantee.description: Every product we sell is backed by manufacturer warranties and our own service commitment. If something is not right with your installation or delivery, our team will come back and make it right — no questions asked. We have built our reputation over 38 years on standing behind every product and every customer.

faqs.question: What brands of hot tubs do you carry?
faqs.answer: We are an authorized Hot Spring and Artesian dealer, carrying their full lineup including salt water models. As a multiple-time Hot Spring Dealer of the Year, we offer the best selection and expertise in the region. Visit our showroom to see models in person.

faqs.question: Do you handle delivery and installation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our own trained technicians handle every delivery and installation — no subcontractors. They ensure proper setup, walk you through operation, and answer all your questions on-site before they leave.

faqs.question: Can I visit your showroom without an appointment?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our full showroom on Highway 17 Bypass in Myrtle Beach is open to walk-ins. Our no-pressure philosophy means you can browse at your own pace, and our team is always available to answer questions when you are ready.

faqs.question: Do you offer service and maintenance after purchase?
faqs.answer: We have a full in-house service department for spas, pools, and billiard tables. From water testing and chemical supplies to repairs and technical support, we are here for the life of your product.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Grand Strand area including Myrtle Beach, North Myrtle Beach, Surfside Beach, Conway, Pawleys Island, Litchfield Beach, and all of Horry County, South Carolina.

testimonials.name: Anne K.
testimonials.text: I have owned spas before but the salt spa I bought from Elko is the best. The team made the entire process seamless from selection to installation.

testimonials.name: Maria B.
testimonials.text: My salesperson was Josh Griffith. He provided exceptional customer service and in-depth product knowledge. He is an asset to Elko Spas.

testimonials.name: Brenda W.
testimonials.text: The delivery team did a great job, they were very professional, friendly, and courteous. Exceptional workmanship throughout the entire process.

contact.headline:
Ready to Create Your
Backyard Oasis?
contact.subtitle: Stop by our Myrtle Beach showroom or call for a free consultation. No pressure, no obligations — just honest guidance from a team that has been doing this for 38 years.
